forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon with possible small hail near the coast. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon then becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Possible small hail in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon with possible small hail. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the east in the morning. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the east in the early morning. The chance of morning frost in the north. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Hawker in the morning. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then turning south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending west to northwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Sunny. Areas of frost and patchy fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 24.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.
Sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
